summary: Comprehensive testing of T.P social media platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (18/18 tests passed). Frontend ~95% functional with excellent user experience. All major features working including auth, posts, messages, AI chat, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Like and comment buttons may not have proper data-testid attributes for testing

integration_issues.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally intercepts clicks
affected_selectors: Various buttons when Emergent badge is present

passed_tests: AI chat with real OpenAI GPT-4o integration
Sidebar navigation (Home, Messages, AI, Settings, Reels)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor UI testing issues)
